attributes.title: Kafka — correlate by request_id
attributes.description: Paste a request_id in the query bar, e.g. request_id: \"your-uuid\" — shows Java publish, Python/Rust consume, and related Postgres lines for one dashboard action.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"_exists_: request_id and (kafka_event: * or service: webserver-benchmark-kafka or controller: (*Kafka* or create_item_consumer or create_user_consumer) or message: (*create-user* or *create-item* or *Kafka*))","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
